    "# hist003_TH1_draw\n",
    "Draw a 1D histogram to a canvas.\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",

   ]

   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import ROOT"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1808492e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Create and fill the histogram.\n",
    "See hist002_TH1_fillrandom_userfunc.C for more information about this section."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "bbbda417",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.507783Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.507645Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.708775Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.708205Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "form1 = ROOT.TFormula(\"form1\", \"abs(sin(x)/x)\")\n",
    "rangeMin = 0.0\n",
    "rangeMax = 10.0\n",
    "sqroot = ROOT.TF1(\"sqroot\", \"x*gaus(0) + [3]*form1\", rangeMin, rangeMax)\n",
    "sqroot.SetLineColor(4)\n",
    "sqroot.SetLineWidth(6)\n",
    "sqroot.SetParameters(10.0, 4.0, 1.0, 20.0)\n",
    "\n",
    "nBins = 200\n",
    "h1d = ROOT.TH1D(\"h1d\", \"Test random numbers\", nBins, rangeMin, rangeMax)\n",
    "\n",
    "h1d.FillRandom(\"sqroot\", 10000)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2047ebf9",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Create a canvas and draw the histogram"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "1d7ca45b",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.710921Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.710772Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.852920Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.852203Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "topX = 200\n",
    "topY = 10\n",
    "width = 700\n",
    "height = 900\n",
    "c1 = ROOT.TCanvas(\"c1\", \"The FillRandom example\", topX, topY, width, height)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "43213fd7",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Split the canvas into two sections to plot both the function and the histogram\n",
    "The TPad's constructor accepts the relative coordinates (0 to 1) of the pad's boundaries"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "3f4abb1b",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.854974Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.854834Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.967556Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.966987Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "pad1 = ROOT.TPad(\"pad1\", \"The pad with the function\", 0.05, 0.50, 0.95, 0.95)\n",
    "pad2 = ROOT.TPad(\"pad2\", \"The pad with the histogram\", 0.05, 0.05, 0.95, 0.45)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ebc92582",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Draw the two pads"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "25c533c9",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.969589Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:46.969450Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.087107Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.086476Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "pad1.Draw()\n",
    "pad2.Draw()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3a2dee84",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Select pad1 to draw the next objects into"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "fa48261e",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.088715Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.088584Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.213856Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.213249Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "pad1.cd()\n",
    "pad1.SetGridx()\n",
    "pad1.SetGridy()\n",
    "pad1.GetFrame().SetBorderMode(-1)\n",
    "pad1.GetFrame().SetBorderSize(5)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1866f544",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Draw the function in pad1"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "aa9a3893",

   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f9d78a55",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Add a label to the function.\n",
    "TPaveLabel's constructor accepts the pixel coordinates and the label string."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "d426f0c9",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.336309Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.336161Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.579854Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.579377Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "\n",
       "\n",
       "<div id=\"root_plot_1783395947702\" style=\"width: 700px; height: 900px; position: relative\">\n",
       "</div>\n",
       "\n",
       "<script>\n",
       "   function process_root_plot_1783395947702() {\n",
       "      function execCode(Core) {\n",
       "         Core.settings.HandleKeys = false;\n",
       "         \n",
       "Core.unzipJSON(34398,'').then(json => {\n",
       "   const obj = Core.parse(json);\n",
       "   Core.draw('root_plot_1783395947702', obj, '');\n",
       "});\n",
       "\n",
       "      }\n",
       "      const servers = ['/static/', 'https://root.cern/js/7.11.0/', 'https://jsroot.gsi.de/7.11.0/'],\n",
       "            path = 'build/jsroot';\n",
       "      if (typeof JSROOT !== 'undefined')\n",
       "         execCode(JSROOT);\n",
       "      else if (typeof requirejs !== 'undefined') {\n",
       "         servers.forEach((s,i) => { servers[i] = s + path; });\n",
       "         requirejs.config({ paths: { 'jsroot' : servers } })(['jsroot'],  execCode);\n",
       "      } else {\n",
       "         const config = document.getElementById('jupyter-config-data');\n",
       "         if (config)\n",
       "            servers[0] = (JSON.parse(config.innerHTML || '{}')?.baseUrl || '/') + 'static/';\n",
       "         else\n",
       "            servers.shift();\n",
       "         function loadJsroot() {\n",
       "            return !servers.length ? 0 : import(servers.shift() + path + '.js').catch(loadJsroot).then(() => execCode(JSROOT));\n",
       "         }\n",
       "         loadJsroot();\n",
       "      }\n",
       "   }\n",
       "   process_root_plot_1783395947702();\n",
       "</script>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "lfunction = ROOT.TPaveLabel(5, 39, 9.8, 46, \"The sqroot function\")\n",
    "lfunction.Draw()\n",
    "c1.Update()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e6c191ae",

    "h1d.Draw()\n",
    "c1.Update()"
   ]

    "Draw all canvases "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "a3105eb4",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.706573Z",

     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.820833Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:47.820528Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "\n",
       "\n",
       "<div id=\"root_plot_1783395947819\" style=\"width: 700px; height: 900px; position: relative\">\n",
       "</div>\n",
       "\n",
       "<script>\n",
       "   function process_root_plot_1783395947819() {\n",
       "      function execCode(Core) {\n",
       "         Core.settings.HandleKeys = false;\n",
       "         \n",
       "Core.unzipJSON(34398,'').then(json => {\n",
       "   const obj = Core.parse(json);\n",
       "   Core.draw('root_plot_1783395947819', obj, '');\n",
       "});\n",
       "\n",
       "      }\n",
       "      const servers = ['/static/', 'https://root.cern/js/7.11.0/', 'https://jsroot.gsi.de/7.11.0/'],\n",
       "            path = 'build/jsroot';\n",
       "      if (typeof JSROOT !== 'undefined')\n",
       "         execCode(JSROOT);\n",
       "      else if (typeof requirejs !== 'undefined') {\n",
       "         servers.forEach((s,i) => { servers[i] = s + path; });\n",
       "         requirejs.config({ paths: { 'jsroot' : servers } })(['jsroot'],  execCode);\n",
       "      } else {\n",
       "         const config = document.getElementById('jupyter-config-data');\n",
       "         if (config)\n",
       "            servers[0] = (JSON.parse(config.innerHTML || '{}')?.baseUrl || '/') + 'static/';\n",
       "         else\n",
       "            servers.shift();\n",
       "         function loadJsroot() {\n",
       "            return !servers.length ? 0 : import(servers.shift() + path + '.js').catch(loadJsroot).then(() => execCode(JSROOT));\n",
       "         }\n",
       "         loadJsroot();\n",
       "      }\n",
       "   }\n",
       "   process_root_plot_1783395947819();\n",
       "</script>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from ROOT import gROOT \n",
    "gROOT.GetListOfCanvases().Draw()"
   ]
